calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Hearing For The Prove-Up Hearing On Pltf'S Req. For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-15-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Mars Goodman and Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff, CameraReady Art.com, Inc.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Cliff Kaplan and Studio EXT, Inc. a California Corporation.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Declarations of Anavaratham M. Palavoor and Sherwood Tung in support of Request for Default Judgment on file.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $43,155.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $9,305.02
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $769.08
Total Judgment in the amount of $53,229.10
Judgment signed in open court.
